name: Spicy Hot Dates
recipeInstructions:
1. Use an 8-ounce package of pitted dates.
2. Cream the butter and cheese together well.
3. Slowly beat in the flour, then add the cayenne pepper to taste.
4. Take small pieces of the mixture and wrap securely around each date.
5. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 10-15 minutes.
